name: SCC_SECCDiscoveryRes
title: SCC_SECCDiscoveryRes
syntax: void SCC_SECCDiscoveryRes ( dword Security, dword TransportProtocolType )
description: The callback is called as soon as an SECC Discovery Response is received.
Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with

parameters.name: Security
parameters.description: 1 for TLS, 0 for no transport layer security
